metadata.title: Surprising Mid Push Scores a Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught the enemies off guard with a quick mid peek and steady aim. Watch how timing and positioning turned this into a clean double kill.
What’s your favorite spot to push in VALORANT?

Share your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
